headline: How The Story Is Shifting For FTI Consulting (FCN) As Valuation And AI Risks Evolve
summary: Analysts recently trimmed their fair value estimate for FTI Consulting to US$174.50 from US$176.50, a move of about 1% that keeps the modeled price target in focus. This adjustment sits alongside Street research that balances optimism about the current growth and margin framework with caution around a tougher consulting setup and AI related risks. As you read on, you will see how these changing targets fit into the broader narrative and what to watch as the story evolves. Analyst Price...
